what: The opt-in documentary-lever variant rows re-measured on papygreek-fold-v3 (registry sub-rows; the baseline row is the papygreek-eval-v3 evidence).
protocol: greek.use_neural_pipeline(); CPU sequential (canonical); gold tokenization; official CoNLL-2018 evaluator; one-shot after the 0.44.0 fold rebuilds (leaf-APOS cc->appos converter correction + per-fold gold repairs); greek.use_neural_pipeline(); the lever toggles (full = use_paradigms + use_documentary_reconciliation + use_documentary_lemma_rescue); greek.evaluate_on_papygreek(); fold papygreek-fold-v3 (sha de687474...). Dev-side lever selection evidence: documentary-levers-2026-07-11.json (unchanged; dev folds are experiment-only)
invariants_checked: reconciliation shares UFeats/lemma/UAS/LAS with the v3 baseline (Lever A touches UPOS/XPOS only); full shares UPOS/XPOS with reconciliation and moves only lemma (86.13->86.36, identical to the v2-fold measurement - the rescue is independent of the DEPREL correction)
